action.reasoning: Observation: test shows sequential preprocess succeeds and mock test runs but predict has image features missing because _prepare_observation was truncated/incomplete (batch lacked the PIL images under observation.images with exact PI0 keys). All evals 0.0 from fallback. Analysis: The working diagnostic pattern (PIL 224x224 for base_0_rgb/left_wrist_0_rgb/right_wrist_0_rgb from rgb[0,2,3], padded 32D state, dummy action, complementary_data+task, sequential processors with restore/merge after language steps) fixes the mutation issue in training pipeline. Full complete predict.py will allow real PI0 predict_action_chunk to run and output meaningful actions for the ee bridge. This is the critical fix for the intended track. Decision: Overwrite predict.py with the full complete code implementing the exact successful pattern from test_preprocess diagnostic, improved _safe_preprocess with restore logic, chunking, tuned bridge. Run tests for validation (expect no predict error, real policy used, FULL PREPROCESS SUCCEEDED). Then submit_eval on the base checkpoint to get the first non-zero success_rate.
